text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having gained a new perspective from her new
rivals, Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan, Nice
Nature enters the Takarazuka Kinen
well-prepared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She swears to win for those who support her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this positive mindset, Nice Nature
challenges the Takarazuka Kinen.
